expectations.evidence: Recommends 'Approach 1: Plugin Hooks' with before_tool_call and after_tool_call configuration
Provides exact config.json with 'npx agent-pulse hook openclaw' for both hooks
Full table of binary-to-family mappings (gh->github, kubectl->kubernetes, etc.) with openclaw/ prefixed service names
Step 1 has npm install, agent-pulse init, and agent-pulse server start
Explicitly states 'No skill files, no code changes, no wrapping individual commands' and 'every exec tool call is tracked automatically'
